profile.name: 5th Planet Games A/S
profile.about: 5th Planet Games A/S is a Copenhagen-based video game publisher and financier listed on Oslo Børs. Originally founded in 2011 as Hugo Games A/S — home to the classic Danish character Hugo — the company rebranded to 5th Planet Games in 2018 following the acquisition of the US-based studio of the same name. In 2021 Skybound Entertainment (the media company behind The Walking Dead and Invincible) made a $10.5 million strategic investment and became the majority shareholder by 2023. The company publishes and co-finances games across mobile, PC, and console, with a portfolio that includes Hugo Troll Race 2, Tintin Match, Before Your Eyes, Invincible Presents: Atom Eve, Escape Academy, and WrestleQuest. It has offices in Copenhagen and Berlin, and has expanded into physical game distribution across the Nordic and Baltic regions, as well as a joint acquisition of Icelandic film and TV company Sagafilm.

people.name: Mark Stanger
people.title: Chief Executive Officer
people.bio: Appointed CEO Sept 2021 following Skybound's investment. Former EMEA GM & VP at Skybound Games. 25+ years in games publishing; previously at Eidos Interactive (Tomb Raider, Hitman, Championship Manager).

people.name: Jon Goldman
people.title: Chairman of the Board
people.bio: Managing Director of Skybound Entertainment. Also Board Partner at VC firm Greycroft.

people.name: Henrik Nielsen
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Former CEO of the company; stayed on as board member and strategic advisor.

people.name: Søren Kokbøl Jensen
people.title: Board Member
people.bio: Long-standing board member with experience in the Nordic games sector.

keyFacts.label: Origins
keyFacts.value: Founded 2011 as Hugo Games A/S; rebranded 5th Planet Games in 2018

keyFacts.label: Listing
keyFacts.value: Listed on Oslo Børs (Euronext Expand) under ticker 5PG; ISIN DK0060945467

keyFacts.label: Shareholding
keyFacts.value: Skybound Entertainment became majority shareholder by September 2023

keyFacts.label: Portfolio
keyFacts.value: Hugo Troll Race 2, Tintin Match, Before Your Eyes, Invincible Presents: Atom Eve, Escape Academy, WrestleQuest

keyFacts.label: Sagafilm
keyFacts.value: Co-acquired Icelandic film/TV company Sagafilm with Skybound (Sept 2023)

keyFacts.label: Distribution
keyFacts.value: Expanded into physical game distribution in Nordics & Baltics from April 2024

keyFacts.label: Corporate
keyFacts.value: Group internal merger completed (5th Planet Games Development ApS dissolved into parent, effective 1 Jan 2024)

funding.description: Triggered CEO change and board restructure; Skybound became majority shareholder by 2023
